channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: US will send a missile defense system and troops to run it to Israel to aid defense against Iran
item.description: The Pentagon says the United States will send a Terminal High Altitude Area Defense battery to Israel along with troops needed to operate it.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: S&P 500 a key predictor of the presidential race
item.description: The incumbent party kept the White House in 12 of the past 15 elections when the S&P 500 was positive ahead of Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hears at a Latino campaign event from someone who lived in the US illegally
item.description: A panelist at a Donald Trump campaign event in Nevada on Saturday admitted to the former president he had come to the United States illegally, and later said he supports a pathway to citizenship for some immigrants under similar circumstances.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Beaumont And Nicholas Riccardi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hunting for male voters: Walz steps into the field for the pheasant opener
item.description: Gov. Tim Walz had more pheasant hunting companions than usual for this year’s opener near Sleepy Eye, on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ben Hovland and The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Ted Cruz and Colin Allred wage another big US Senate fight in Texas
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — Attack ads on every TV break. Campaign money pouring in. And on a sunny Saturday, a crowd stretching out the door for a campaign rally at Tulip's, a popular Fort Worth nightclub — this time for Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY and JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rebuilding Florida after Hurricane Milton and protecting against scams
item.description:
Recovery efforts can unite communities after catastrophic damage. Neighbors come together to help one another, while state officials and law enforcement work diligently to restore order. Gradually, residents begin to see their homes return to normalcy.
But even with the good, comes the bad.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: North Carolina governor blasts 'flat out lie' from Trump on disaster aid
item.description: "Trump’s lies and conspiracy theories have hurt the morale of first responders and people who lost everything, helped scam artists and put government and rescue workers in danger," said North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: If you let your flood insurance lapse and then got hit by Helene, you may be able to renew it
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Residents in the states hit by Hurricane Helene who had coverage through the federal flood insurance program but let it lapse before the storm hit may be able to renew it and still be covered from the impact.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Allred pushes back on Cruz transgender attack ads
item.description: “Ted Cruz is lying again, but now he's lying about our children. I'm a dad. I'm also a Christian,” Allred said on camera.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What is California Proposition 33?
item.description: California voters this November will decide whether to expand rent control statewide by repealing a 1995 law. The Costa-Hawkins Rental Housing Act currently limits a local government's ability to cap rents on newer properties and single-family homes.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prepared to sit out election over war abroad, a young Minnesota voter finds her way back into the fold
item.description: As the Democratic presidential ticket changed, a young voter came around to supporting it despite her frustrations with U.S. policy toward war in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: Biden specially called out a claim that those impacted by the storm are only receiving $750 in government assistance.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Maryland Senate debate
item.description: Former Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan (R) and Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks (D) sparred in their lone debate this cycle Thursday night as they look to replace retiring Sen. Ben Cardin (D-Md.) next year.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's complaints about '60 Minutes' put a spotlight on editing at the nation's top newsmagazine
item.description: Donald Trump skipped a “60 Minutes” interview this past week, but he's attacking CBS for how it handled its session with opponent Kamala Harris, calling it a “giant fake news scam” and suggesting the network was out to protect her.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Tallahassee sends city crews to aid Tampa Bay recovery efforts
item.description: As communities wait for daylight to come Thursday morning to see the damage that has been done and for emergency personnel to start rescue efforts, counties in north Florida are sending their crews to the Tampa Bay area to aid in recovery.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shondra Summers-Armstrong discusses key issues in Las Vegas city council race
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) — Shondra Summers-Armstrong, currently serving as an Assemblywoman for District 6, is running for Las Vegas City Council, Ward 5.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NJ assemblyman's car stolen, house broken into
item.description: HAZLET, N.J. (PIX11) - Video from the home where a New Jersey assemblyman is currently living shows alleged burglars break into the home and speed away with his personal car - complete with State Assembly plates.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Matisyahu says he is voting for Trump
item.description: "I just feel that the Jews are like, under attack, and that the current administration really doesn't care," Matisyahu said.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Pro-defund police Dem in key race once threatened to 'kill' and 'bury' man over the phone: police records
item.description: New Mexico police records show Rep. Gabe Vasquez threatened to "kill" and "bury" a man over the phone before acknowledging he made the call and apologizing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Candidate Kamilah Bywaters discusses her vision for the Clark County School Board
item.description: Kamilah Bywaters, a candidate for the Clark County School District (CCSD) Board of Trustees, joined 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide to discuss her plans and priorities for District E, which covers Summerlin and northwest parts of the Las Vegas Valley.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Brown says no to pro-Palestinian students' demands for divestment
item.description: Supporters of divestment ended their encampment last spring in exchange for a promise that their proposal for divestment would get a vote from the board this fall.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: Michigan US Senate debate: Rogers, Slotkin race could determine control
item.description: Rogers and Slotkin meet on Tuesday for an hour-long debate hosted by Nexstar's WOOD-TV, beginning at 7 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Van Gilder, Fox 5

item.title: Election drop boxes open in San Diego County
item.description: While mail ballots are expected to arrive this week for registered voters, 150 official ballot drop boxes opened Tuesday in San Diego County for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Harris, Walz appeared on ABC's 'The View' and 'Jimmy Kimmel Live'
item.description: The Democratic presidential ticket is on a media blitz in New York. Vice President Kamala Harris appeared Tuesday on ABC's “The View," and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz appeared on ABC's “Jimmy Kimmel Live” on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear Pennsylvania legislators' challenge to executive actions expanding voting access
item.description: The Supreme Court decided Monday it won’t take up a case to restore a lawsuit by Pennsylvania Republicans that challenged executive actions expanding voting access on the basis that only state legislatures can regulate federal elections.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5
